text.title: In-Issue Ad Format Library Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to build, run, and review the in-issue ad format library.

step.name: compute-baseline
step.input: 90 days of issue analytics (open rate, CTR, post-click conversion).
step.action: Compute median CTR + CVR across all sends. Persist baseline.ctr_pct, baseline.cvr_pct, baseline.computed_at.
step.decision-gate: If <90 days of data, baseline carries a "preliminary" flag; benchmarks remain provisional.

step.name: define-library
step.action: Confirm the 4 named formats with cadence caps. No format additions without ratifying a cap and a baseline measurement plan.

step.name: build-8-issue-rotation
step.input: library + product launch / feature calendar + lead-magnet inventory.
step.action: Fill templates/rotation-plan.csv with 8 issues. Assign format + cta_destination per cadence caps. Ensure ≥1 'none' issue per 6 to reset trust budget.
step.decision-gate: Cadence cap exceeded → block. Self-promo share > 80% → block.

step.name: run-and-measure
step.action: Send issues per plan. Track per-issue CTR + CVR + unsubscribe delta. Tag each format instance as below/at/above baseline.

step.name: rotate-after-each-issue
step.action: If a format is below_baseline for 3 consecutive uses, replace its next slot with 'none' or a soft_ps. If above_baseline twice in a row, allow +1 slot within cap.

step.name: monthly-review
step.action: Compute per-format CTR + CVR vs baseline. Set review.promoted_format + review.demoted_format. Update library cap notes if a format pattern emerges.
